summary: A color-graded montage set to music posted by POTUS. Fast-cut footage shows Marine One on the White House lawn at golden hour, a prayer scene under carved 'IN GOD WE TRUST' lettering, a crowd of service members in an aircraft hangar, and Trump applauding a helicopter flyover. It ends on a title card reading 'THE WHITE HOUSE / PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.' There is no speech; the audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Head-on shot of Marine One (green-and-white VH-3) parked on the White House South Lawn at golden hour, boarding stairs extended; backlit composition. No talking (music bed).
Dim interior scene of a prayer/blessing with Trump bowed before a US flag, gold lettering 'IN GOD WE TRUST' carved on the wall; attendees with hands raised.
Wide shot of a large crowd of service members filling a military aircraft hangar, a large American flag and fighter jets framing a stage.
Low-angle shot of Trump applauding as Army helicopters (Chinooks, Black Hawks, Apaches) fly over against a blue sky next to a waving American flag.
Closing title card: dark engraving of the White House facade with a waving flag, centered serif text 'THE WHITE HOUSE / PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

notable_text: On-screen end card: 'THE WHITE HOUSE / PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'; in-frame engraving 'IN GOD WE TRUST'. Tweet: 'AMERICA IS BACK.' / 'This will truly be the golden age of America.'
